text: I've been using Fluent for some time and now I have a 20-day streak. Lately I've just been doing a single lesson last minute every single evening  to only keep my streak going. I am stressing about remembering to do it every day and I want to give up my streak :(
Today’s lesson on Fluent I got translation, listening, and speaking tasks. I’m curious whether everyone gets the same mix of activities or if the tasks vary by user. What did you get today?
I noticed that my Fluent streak reached 40 days today. I’m curious how long other people have been using the app and what your current streaks are.
I recently started the Japanese course at Fluent.
Just realized that each lesson on Fluent ends with a short review quiz covering the main words and concepts from the lesson. The quiz appears automatically before you move on to the next lesson.
